title: peperomia quadrifolia
intro: Peperomia quadrifolia, also known as the American pepperwort or American lizard tail, is a plant species in the family Piperaceae, native to the southeastern United States. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Peperomia quadrifolia include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
